name: technology_policy_cold_chain_millhaven_auto_ben
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Technology Policy, the situation tagged internally around technology policy cold chain millhaven auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is autonomy versus beneficence under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Zara Serrano
agents.identity: I am Zara Serrano, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Technology Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Reed
agents.identity: I am Ravi Reed, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Technology Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Zara Serrano must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Zara Serrano do?
